title: KeyResult
description: A Key Result (target) within a Goal.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Key Result.

goal_id.description: The Goal ID this Key Result belongs to.

name.description: The name of the Key Result.

creator.description: The user ID of the Key Result creator.

type.description: The type of the Key Result target.

date_created.description: Unix timestamp when the Key Result was created.

goal_pretty_id.description: The human-readable ID of the parent Goal.

percent_completed.description: The completion percentage of the Key Result.

completed.description: Whether the Key Result is completed.

task_ids.description: Task IDs linked to this Key Result for automatic tracking.

list_ids.description: List IDs linked to this Key Result for automatic tracking.

steps_start.description: The starting value of the Key Result.

steps_end.description: The target end value of the Key Result.

steps_current.description: The current value of the Key Result.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for currency type Key Results.

last_action.description: Details of the last action performed on the Key Result.
